commit.subject: LU-17216 mdt: implement generic health writes
commit.message:
LU-17216 mdt: implement generic health writes

Generalize the OFD health write functions to
be target agnostic. Add an MDT health check
where we use this new generic tgt_health_write()
function.

Add a new sanity test to exercise the health check
and health write functionality.

Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I326b725cf72e643fad633d88d46c1ee5fe6ad6b5
